tasks.name: 01_S000_父女对峙_开场
tasks.prompt: Interior of an ancient Chinese noble family house, daytime. Soft side light from doorway cuts across the room. a slender young noblewoman with pale skin, oval face, sharp calm almond eyes, straight dark brows with a hint of sharpness, black hair in a neat low bun, wearing muted moon-white silk hanfu robes, elegant yet emotionally guarded stands motionless at the right side of frame, spine perfectly straight. a dignified middle-aged scholar-official father with lean build, graying temples, stern furrowed brows, deep nasolabial folds, restrained but protective expression, wearing dark teal-blue hanfu robe, scholarly bearing paces around her in the left-center, circling between her front and side, his movement creating an oppressive interrogation rhythm. A wooden table in blurred foreground, doorframe forming a cage-like second layer trapping both figures. Fixed camera, medium wide shot. Oppressive, confined atmosphere. Song dynasty interior. Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, film grain.

tasks.name: 03_S000_父女对峙_冷笑
tasks.prompt: Interior ancient Chinese house, daytime. Medium wide shot. a slender young noblewoman with pale skin, oval face, sharp calm almond eyes, straight dark brows with a hint of sharpness, black hair in a neat low bun, wearing muted moon-white silk hanfu robes, elegant yet emotionally guarded remains pinned at the right side of frame, absolutely still. a dignified middle-aged scholar-official father with lean build, graying temples, stern furrowed brows, deep nasolabial folds, restrained but protective expression, wearing dark teal-blue hanfu robe, scholarly bearing paces from left foreground to background and back, furniture cutting the space. tasks.name: 04_S000_父女对峙_退让
tasks.prompt: Interior ancient Chinese house, daytime. Close-up on a slender young noblewoman with pale skin, oval face, sharp calm almond eyes, straight dark brows with a hint of sharpness, black hair in a neat low bun, wearing muted moon-white silk hanfu robes, elegant yet emotionally guarded in three-quarter profile at right side, large negative space to her left. She quietly says 'I know' — her expression barely changes but her eyes grow colder, the words cutting like a blade. Medium shot: a dignified middle-aged scholar-official father with lean build, graying temples, stern furrowed brows, deep nasolabial folds, restrained but protective expression, wearing dark teal-blue hanfu robe, scholarly bearing finally stops pacing. He stands still, drops his hands, presses his chest and slowly exhales. Window lattice shadows cross his chest. His aggression transforms into weary surrender. He lowers his voice, offering her a way out — if she doesn't want to marry, he'll find an excuse to refuse. Dolly camera movement. Cold-hard mood shifting to false calm. Song dynasty interior, cinematic.

tasks.name: 05_S000_父女对峙_反问
tasks.prompt: Interior ancient Chinese house, daytime. Medium close-up: a slender young noblewoman with pale skin, oval face, sharp calm almond eyes, straight dark brows with a hint of sharpness, black hair in a neat low bun, wearing muted moon-white silk hanfu robes, elegant yet emotionally guarded first looks down, then slowly raises her eyes toward the left where her father stands. Background darkens, only a thin line of light from the doorway remains. Her chin lifts slightly, showing sharp determination in her stillness. Close-up: camera presses tight on her face. She asks quietly but firmly: 'Who said I don't want to marry?' Background simplified to cold grey wall and blurred window shadows. All information and control falls on her. Close-up: a dignified middle-aged scholar-official father with lean build, graying temples, stern furrowed brows, deep nasolabial folds, restrained but protective expression, wearing dark teal-blue hanfu robe, scholarly bearing — his gaze freezes, mouth slightly open but speechless. Doorway light behind him feels more oppressive. He is pushed outside his frame of understanding. Dolly movement, sharp and stunning reversal. Cinematic, Song dynasty.

result.file: G:\涛项目\claude版\测试\第7次测试结果视频\05_S000_父女对峙_反问.mp4

tasks.name: 06_S000_父女对峙_宣言
tasks.prompt: Interior ancient Chinese house, daytime. Low angle close-up pressing toward a slender young noblewoman with pale skin, oval face, sharp calm almond eyes, straight dark brows with a hint of sharpness, black hair in a neat low bun, wearing muted moon-white silk hanfu robes, elegant yet emotionally guarded. She stands centered, window lattice shadows behind her like prison bars cutting the cold grey background. She states without blinking: 'I must marry' — her voice steady, carrying absolute will, as if seizing control of this arranged marriage with her own hands. Then medium wide shot returning to the opening composition: a dignified middle-aged scholar-official father with lean build, graying temples, stern furrowed brows, deep nasolabial folds, restrained but protective expression, wearing dark teal-blue hanfu robe, scholarly bearing stopped at left, no longer pacing. a slender young noblewoman with pale skin, oval face, sharp calm almond eyes, straight dark brows with a hint of sharpness, black hair in a neat low bun, wearing muted moon-white silk hanfu robes, elegant yet emotionally guarded still at right, unmoved. Empty space between them with diagonal light on the floor like an invisible boundary. Table corner presses foreground down. Doorway still bright, but neither walks toward it. Dolly, then fixed. Resolute, icy fracture. Cinematic, Song dynasty interior.

result.file: G:\涛项目\claude版\测试\第7次测试结果视频\06_S000_父女对峙_宣言.mp4

tasks.name: 07_S001_订亲正堂_木雁登场
tasks.prompt: Interior of a grand ancient Chinese family hall during a betrothal ceremony, daytime. Doorframe composition. Gold and silver silks laid out in perfect rows as betrothal gifts. a dignified middle-aged scholar-official father with lean build, graying temples, stern furrowed brows, deep nasolabial folds, restrained but protective expression, wearing dark teal-blue hanfu robe, scholarly bearing sits at the head position, smiling. A matchmaker stands beside the gifts. a tall aristocratic young nobleman with pale cold skin, sharp jawline, narrow dark eyes, straight black hair in a neat topknot, wearing dark ink-blue brocade hanfu with jade ornament, restrained and cold expression, handsome yet emotionally guarded stands further back, half-hidden behind ceremonial objects, reserved and cold. At the brightest center spot sits a conspicuously crude wooden goose — out of place among the wealth. Subjective shot: a slender young noblewoman with pale skin, oval face, sharp calm almond eyes, straight dark brows with a hint of sharpness, black hair in a neat low bun, wearing muted moon-white silk hanfu robes, elegant yet emotionally guarded enters through moon-white sleeves crossing frame. Her gaze bypasses all faces, cutting through the gifts to lock onto the wooden goose. Close-up of the wooden goose surrounded by gold and silk, rough wood grain lit by side-backlight, its cheapness painfully obvious amid the luxury. Fixed camera, formal yet oppressive. Song dynasty betrothal hall, cinematic.

Medium shot: a dignified middle-aged scholar-official father with lean build, graying temples, stern furrowed brows, deep nasolabial folds, restrained but protective expression, wearing dark teal-blue hanfu robe, scholarly bearing slams the table, standing up abruptly. The matchmaker clutches the goose, squeezed between father and daughter trying to mediate. a tall aristocratic young nobleman with pale cold skin, sharp jawline, narrow dark eyes, straight black hair in a neat topknot, wearing dark ink-blue brocade hanfu with jade ornament, restrained and cold expression, handsome yet emotionally guarded still stands deep in the frame, watching coldly.
